title: Invisible Light Block
description: Allow you to craft invisible light block
body:
Bring Creative build possibilities to your survival world ! Players can now craft vanille Light Blocks !

![Craft](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d81951be654e033f57da1beabe5286c188b2f104.png)

What makes it special:
- No mod loader needed
- Easy to craft
- Simple DataPack available for all minecraft version from 1.13 to 26.1.2

Perfect for:
- Survival servers/world wanting build enlightened
- Creative builds enlightened
